reason: Recent experiments are over-concentrated in family 'take-profit'; try a different mechanism/family before more local tuning.

changes.reason: Expand the highest-efficiency VALID_0DTE continuation profile without touching global filters; current 7-trade sample has 224.5 PnL/exposure hour and only -346.8 worst MAE, so reducing the higher-high hurdle should admit nearby breakaway continuations while preserving the breakout identity.

Allow a slightly wider but still bounded charm-wall acceptance zone to test whether the profile can scale beyond 7 trades; this follows the strategist's sample-expansion thesis and avoids the failed call-wall acceptance family.

Current 12-point median target produced strong average PnL but 40.5 minute average hold; lowering the multiplier one grid step should improve fill speed and exposure efficiency while still leaving this profile with larger targets than pullback/charm-pin profiles.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should increase charm_wall_breakaway_long opportunity count and/or reduce its average hold while preserving high profile PnL per exposure hour. Main tradeoff is admitting lower-quality wall-chase entries, so reject if profile efficiency falls below roughly 200 PnL/exposure hour, total worst MAE worsens beyond -527, or net profit fails to retain 98% of run_001.
recommendation.label: promote
recommendation.rationale: Use batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long as the next isolated family. Take-profit and 1DTE quality gates are saturated and historically harmful, while charm_wall_breakaway_long is underexplored and is the best meaningful VALID_0DTE efficiency profile: 7 trades, 1060.6 PnL, 224.5 PnL/exposure hour, no slow trades, and -346.8 worst MAE. This is a bounded profile-specific expansion, not a global entry-veto tightening or stale-data policy change.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long has only 7 trades but contributes 1060.6 PnL with 151.5 average PnL, 224.5 PnL/exposure hour, 12-point median TP, no slow >=12h trades, and materially better worst MAE than pullback_long.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Breakaway Sample Expansion
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample may be overfit; relaxing the wall-distance and higher-high requirements could add weaker continuation attempts that dilute profile efficiency or increase MAE.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE state with charm-wall breakaway context, acceptable distance above the charm wall, and modest positive ES higher-high structure.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Profile trades increase with profile PnL/exposure hour staying above 200, total net profit at least 98% of run_001, total PnL/exposure hour flat or better, and total worst MAE no worse than -527.
